questions.text: Which statement best describes multiple identity?
options: Pretending to be someone different online
Feeling connected to more than one role, community, or culture at the same time

questions.text: Which of these is a pull factor for migration?
options: War or conflict in someone's home country
A lack of jobs forcing people to leave
Better education or job opportunities in another country

questions.text: Which example best shows belonging to wider UK society rather than just your local community?
options: Your local youth club on your street
Laws made by UK Parliament that apply across the country
The shops and neighbours on your road
